name: Taplio
description:
What Taplio Does

Taplio is designed to help professionals (individuals and businesses) enhance their LinkedIn presence and audience engagement. It offers features to support content creation, scheduling, and analytics. With the robust AI capabilities for brainstorming and content creation, you’ll never run out of great post ideas.

Source: Taplio

Key Features

  • Content Creation: Taplio offers tools to create engaging LinkedIn content, including AI support.
  • Scheduling: Schedule posts in advance.
  • Analytics: Track your LinkedIn post’s performance and identify areas for improvement.
  • Engagement Tools: Boost your audience engagement with effective interactive tools.

Benefits of Taplio

  • Use AI to generate engaging LinkedIn content.
  • Create a robust online footprint with automated scheduling: Schedule thoughtful posts in advance on LinkedIn.
  • Performance analytics offers insights to improve your outcomes.
  • Networking enhancements help you get the most out of your LinkedIn presence.

Pricing

Taplio comes in three plans:

  • Starter: USD 32 /month   
  • Standard: USD 49 /month   
  • Pro:  USD 149 /month  

Pros

✅Post scheduling on LinkedIn  

✅AI features 

✅Easy to implement and integrate with LinkedIn 

Cons

🚫Primarily focused on content for LinkedIn 

🚫Pricing is relatively high - considering the limited features
